'''tabasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hiatellid|hiatellid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hiatellid|hiatellid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tabasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæbæsæth|tæbæsæth]] || [[word:tæbæsæj|tæbæsæj]] || [[word:tæbæsæsh|tæbæsæsh]] || [[word:tæbæsæ|tæbæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tababasath|tababasath]] || [[word:tababasaj|tababasaj]] || [[word:tababasash|tababasash]] || [[word:tababasa|tababasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tabasath|tabasath]] || [[word:tabasaj|tabasaj]] || [[word:tabasash|tabasash]] || [[word:tabasa|tabasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tabafsath|tabafsath]] || [[word:tabafsaj|tabafsaj]] || [[word:tabafsash|tabafsash]] || [[word:tabafsaf|tabafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tabasatha|tabasatha]] || [[word:tabasaja|tabasaja]] || [[word:tabasasha|tabasasha]] || [[word:tabasaka|tabasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tabasath|tabasath]] || [[word:tabasaj|tabasaj]] || [[word:tabasash|tabasash]] || [[word:tabasa|tabasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tabasathal|tabasathal]] || [[word:tabasajal|tabasajal]] || [[word:tabasashal|tabasashal]] || [[word:tabasakal|tabasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tabasathatha|tabasathatha]] || [[word:tabasajaja|tabasajaja]] || [[word:tabasashasha|tabasashasha]] || [[word:tabasaka|tabasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tabasathan|tabasathan]] || [[word:tabasajan|tabasajan]] || [[word:tabasashan|tabasashan]] || [[word:tabasakan|tabasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tabasathaoro|tabasathaoro]] || [[word:tabasajaoro|tabasajaoro]] || [[word:tabasashaoro|tabasashaoro]] || [[word:tabasakaoro|tabasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
